chapter_title.ar: باب الصَّلَاةِ خَلْفَ مَنْ لَا يُقْتَدَى بِهِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 50 – The Salāt behind the one whom one does not follow with Non-Shias)

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (5/255)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (5/255)
text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) عَنِ الصَّلَاةِ خَلْفَ الْمُخَالِفِينَ فَقَالَ مَا هُمْ عِنْدِي إِلَّا بِمَنْزِلَةِ الْجُدُرِ .

en.hubeali: From him, from Ahmad, from Abdullah Bin Muhammad Al Hajjal, from Sa’alba, from Zurara who said,
‘I asked Abu Ja’farasws about the Salāt behind the adversaries. So heasws said: ‘They are not in myasws presence except at the status of the walls (bunch of bricks)’.
en.sarwar: 2. It is a narration from him (narrator of previous Hadith) by Ahmad from ‘Abd Allah ibn Muhammad al-Hajjal from Tha’labah from Zurarah who has said the following: “I once asked abu Ja’far, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about performing Salah (prayer) behind those who oppose our belief. He (the Imam) said, ‘To me they are but walls (scarecrows).”’
